title: Local Clusters, Cluster Lifecycle, Conformance, Upgrades, Backup, and Production Defense · API and Operations Recall
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs local clusters, cluster lifecycle, conformance, upgrades, backup, and production defense from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the cluster lifecycle and recovery defense under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for cluster lifecycle and recovery defense after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Create and inspect a minikube 1.38.1 learning cluster while naming driver, node, runtime, networking, storage, add-on, tunnel, resource, and production-transfer limits.
Trace kubeadm bootstrap, certificates, static Pods, control-plane endpoints, etcd membership, kubelet configuration, CNI installation, join tokens, and high-availability responsibilities.
Evaluate Kubernetes conformance, supported versions, distribution lifecycle, cloud integration, add-ons, feature gates, APIs, operational ownership, and vendor support.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Minikube Local Transfer · changed case · Review K8s Minikube Local Transfer
steps.instruction:
